title: The Crew Drifts Toward a Strange Island
description: On pages 1–4, Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island where Gaimon and the rare animals guard a lonely mystery.
scene: The crew’s lighthearted exploration turns into a small fable about treasure, isolation, and the life Gaimon built after being trapped on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think that should do it, try not to poke it too much

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You did a great job in fixing this hat

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Didn't you listen to what I just said?!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop poking me with that needle, it hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's useless if I hit you, so I have to use the needle!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You guys are too noisy! I can't sleep with all this noise

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, please! You need to be more prepared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You don't bring food or water and you dare to go to sea,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a miracle you've survived up to now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's unpopu- Lated, so it's useless! Let's just keep going!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let's see if we can find someone who would join us there...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And let's look for food too. You know, Nami was right, we seem to have no plans!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Like I said, this is an unpopu- lasted island!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It would be weird if you found someone for the crew here!

summary: This part works as a pause between major arcs, showing that the sea contains strange lives and unusual dreams beyond simple battles.
